Configurations, drivers, utilities, tests, scripts, and build tools for the Snowy platform boot process.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Configurations, drivers, system utilities, and tests for Snowy platform boot process, including firmware updates and error handling.
- **[test](test/README.md)**: Tests for system flash memory operations, including erase and write functions, with error handling.
- **[vendor](vendor/README.md)**: Configures and builds the STM32F4xx standard peripheral library for the Snowy platform.
- **[waftools](waftools/README.md)**: Tools for creating headers, defining macros, extracting Git info, processing linker scripts, and converting files.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control for the snowy boot platform.
- **[boot-bin-update.sh](boot-bin-update.sh.md)**: Updates bootloader binaries for specified boards by building and copying them to the output directory.
- **[desym.sh](desym.sh.md)**: A shell script to map addresses to line numbers in the snowy_boot.elf executable.
- **[flash](flash.md)**: Bash script to flash the bootloader binary onto a device using OpenOCD.
- **[gdb](gdb.md)**: A script to start GDB with OpenOCD for debugging the snowy boot process.
- **[openocd_bb2_ftdi.cfg](openocd_bb2_ftdi.cfg.md)**: Configuration for FTDI interface with specific VID/PID and signal layout settings.
- **[run-tests.sh](run-tests.sh.md)**: A shell script to compile and run tests for the Pebble firmware using the Clar testing framework.
- **[spalding-bin-update.sh](spalding-bin-update.sh.md)**: A Bash script to update and build bootloader binaries for the Spalding board in the Pebble firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build configuration and options for the Snowy platform bootloader in the Pebble firmware.
